title: Drip vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Drip and Omnisend email marketing platforms. See pricing, features, ratings and which tool suits your ecommerce business.
h1: Drip vs Omnisend: Detailed Comparison for Ecommerce
intro: Both Drip and Omnisend are specialized email and SMS marketing platforms built for ecommerce businesses. This comparison breaks down their pricing, features, and customer satisfaction to help you choose the right tool for your store's marketing needs.

comparison_table.tool_a: Revenue attribution, ecommerce tracking, visual automation
comparison_table.tool_b: Omnichannel approach, push notifications, pre-built workflows, product picker

choose_a_if: You need advanced revenue attribution and deep ecommerce transaction tracking
You want a tool specifically optimized for maximizing store revenue through email
You prefer working with a platform focused primarily on email and SMS for ecommerce
choose_b_if: You want to start with a free plan before committing financially
You need omnichannel marketing including push notifications alongside email and SMS
You value customer support and satisfaction based on Trustpilot ratings

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your priorities. Drip excels at revenue attribution and ecommerce tracking, making it ideal for stores focused on maximizing email ROI. Omnisend offers better value, broader omnichannel capabilities, and higher customer satisfaction scores.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Drip or Omnisend?
faq.a: Omnisend is significantly cheaper for small businesses because it offers a free plan supporting up to 250 contacts. Drip starts at $39/month with no free option. However, Omnisend's paid plans begin at just $16/month, making it more budget-friendly overall.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to Drip?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list exports and integrations with major ecommerce platforms like Shopify. Most of your contact data and segmentation can be migrated, though you may need to recreate automation workflows from scratch in the new platform.
